children.heading: Establishment
children.label: a Establishment
children.text: There is hereby established in the Treasury a revolving fund for the Federal Library and Information Network program (hereafter in sections 182a to 182d of this title referred to as the “FEDLINK program”) of the Library of Congress (as described in subsection (f)(1)) and the Federal Research program of the Library of Congress (as described in subsection (f)(2)).

children.heading: Individual accounting requirement
children.label: b Individual accounting requirement
children.text: A separate account shall be maintained in the revolving fund under this section with respect to the programs described in subsection (a).

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Librarian may charge a fee for services under the FEDLINK program and the Federal Research program, and shall deposit any such fees charged into the account of the revolving fund under this section for such program.

children.label: A
children.text: if the Librarian determines that amounts in the Revolving Fund are otherwise insufficient to cover the costs of providing such products and services; or1So in original. Probably should not be capitalized.1

children.label: B
children.text: upon agreement between participants and the Librarian.

children.label: A
children.text: Amounts deposited by the Librarian under subsection (c).

children.label: B
children.text: Any other amounts received by the Librarian which are attributable to the program covered by such account.

children.label: C
children.text: Amounts deposited by the Librarian under paragraph (2).

children.label: D
children.text: Such other amounts as may be appropriated under law.

children.label: A
children.text: Any obligated, unexpended balances existing as of the date of the transfer which are attributable to the FEDLINK program or the Federal Research program.

children.label: i
children.text: the total value of the supplies, inventories, equipment, gift fund balances, and other assets attributable to such program; and

children.label: ii
children.text: the total value of the liabilities attributable to such program.

children.heading: Use of amounts in fund
children.label: e Use of amounts in fund
children.text: Amounts in the accounts of the revolving fund under this section shall be available to the Librarian, in amounts specified in appropriations Acts and without fiscal year limitation, to carry out the program covered by each such account.

children.label: A
children.text: The procurement of commercial information services, publications in any format, and library support services.

children.label: C
children.text: Related education, information, and support services.

children.heading: Federal Research program
children.label: 2 Federal Research program
children.text: In this section, the “Federal Research program” is the program of the Library of Congress under which the Librarian provides research reports, translations, and analytical studies for entities of the Federal Government and the District of Columbia (other than any program of the Congressional Research Service).
